benefits.description: Increased lipolysis and free fatty acid release

protocol_notes: User consumes whey isolate protein shake with stevia/monk fruit sweetener approximately 1 hour before bed after evening Tesa dose. Reports blood glucose at fasting levels by the time of bed despite shake consumption. Notes whey isolate is very low glycemic with minimal ingredients. Uses continuous glucose monitoring (CGM) to track personal glucose response. Emphasizes that optimal fasting timeline is individualized based on when blood glucose reaches fasting levels, not absolute time. Notes lipolysis benefits peak 2-4 hours post-dose.
